# nayatel_routers (Data Source)

List available routers. Use this to reference existing routers instead of creating new ones.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `routers` (Attributes List) List of routers (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routers))

<a id="nestedatt--routers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routers`

Read-Only:

- `attached_subnet` (String) Attached subnet name
- `external_ip` (String) External IP address
- `external_network` (String) External network name
- `id` (String) Router ID
- `name` (String) Router name
- `status` (String) Router status
